per_outcome.operationalization: Percentage change in self-reported total implementation time (including pre- and post-pull request review) between AI-allowed and AI-disallowed issues
Developers' pre-randomization forecast of AI's effect on completion time; measures expectations, not actual performance
Developers' post-study retrospective estimate of AI's effect on completion time; measures perception, not actual performance
Economics experts' forecasts of AI's effect on implementation time; measures expert predictions, not actual performance
Machine learning experts' forecasts of AI's effect on implementation time; measures expert predictions, not actual performance
Pearson correlation between developers' forecasted and actual time on AI-allowed issues; measures forecasting accuracy, not task performance
Pearson correlation between developers' forecasted and actual time on AI-disallowed issues; measures forecasting accuracy, not task performance
Proportion of time spent reviewing and cleaning AI outputs, measured from labeled screen recordings (n=44); measures process behavior, not speed or quality
Proportion of time spent waiting on AI outputs, measured from labeled screen recordings; measures process behavior, not speed or quality
Percentage of AI generations accepted when using Cursor; measures adoption behavior, not speed or quality of final output
Percentage of developers self-reporting reading every line of AI code; measures review behavior, not speed or quality
Percentage of developers self-reporting often needing major changes to clean up AI code; measures perceived effort, not speed or quality
Percentage of developers self-reporting needing to modify AI code; measures modification behavior, not speed or quality
Mean time spent on implementation after pull request review, measured in hours
Percentage of AI-allowed issues where AI was actually used, from manually labeled screen recordings (n=74); measures adoption, not performance
Percentage of AI-disallowed issues where AI was used, from labeled screen recordings (n=54); measures compliance, not performance
Percentage change in completion time, subsetting to developers with no uncompleted AI-disallowed issues
Percentage change in completion time, subsetting to developers with no uncompleted AI-allowed issues
Percentage change in completion time, subsetting to developers with no dropout on any issues
Percentage change in completion time using total screen recording time instead of self-reported time
Percentage difference in code written per hour on AI-allowed issues versus AI-disallowed forecasts; measures output volume, not speed or quality
Percentage of developers continuing AI tool use after study completion; measures adoption, not performance
Percentage change in completion time, restricting to developers using comparable IDEs across treatment conditions
Raw percentage difference in implementation times between AI-allowed and AI-disallowed issues, without adjustment
Percentage change in completion time on issues where developers have high prior task exposure
Percentage change in completion time on issues where developers need fewer external resources
Percentage change in completion time comparing developers who report scope creep on AI-allowed issues versus those who do not
Percentage of developers experiencing slowdown; measures prevalence of effect, not magnitude of speed or quality
Percentage change in completion time on issues where developers predicted ≥33% speedup or top tertile forecasted speedup
